productDisplayName: Playboy Men Casual Brown Casual Shoes
description: Designed for the cool and casual thinkers, this canvas shoe from playboy oozes confidence, style and comfort. Slip into these shoes and seize the day with much ease, while the fabric upper keeps you fresh and comfortable and the stylish lugs on the outsole enhance your fashion statement. Upper Brown denim upper for easy maintenance and durability Carbon rubber toe box and foxing in light green for enhanced protection to the forefoot and style Long canvas tongue for added comfort and snug Fit Lace-ups through metal eyelets for snug fit and durability Metallic eyelets on the medial midfoot for enhanced ventilation Brand logo printed on the lateral midfoot for absolute style Midsole Cushioned insole with a fabric footbed for all-day sweat-free comfort Brand badge on the heel for enhanced style Outsole Vulcanized rubber outsole in green for flexibility and traction in style Brand logo-shaped lugs on the forefoot in hexagonal cells, with herringbone and slant grooves throughout the forefoot and wave pattern grooves on the heel shoe care Make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
